description: Premium product photography in editorial lifestyle contexts. Phase One quality. The product is hero but the environment sells the story.
base_prompt: hyper-realistic commercial product photograph of {product_description} styled in {scene_description}, {lighting_description}, shot on {camera_model}

product.item: string — exact product description with material and finish. e.g. 'matte black titanium Ridge wallet, slim profile, showing card slot texture'
product.material: string — surface finish detail. e.g. 'brushed titanium with subtle directional grain, fingerprint-free'
product.color: string — exact color with hex if known. e.g. 'matte black (#1A1A1A) with gunmetal grey hardware'
product.size_reference: string — what it's next to for scale. e.g. 'sitting next to an espresso cup for scale'
product.label_text: string or null — any text on the product. e.g. '"RIDGE" debossed in small sans-serif on front plate'
product.hero_angle: string — which side faces camera. e.g. 'three-quarter front view, slight tilt to show thickness, card peeking out of top slot'

scene.surface: string — e.g. 'honed white Carrara marble countertop with subtle grey veining, polished to satin finish'
scene.setting: string — e.g. 'sunlit Scandinavian kitchen, morning, floor-to-ceiling windows in background'
props: array of 2-4 complementary items. e.g. 'single stem white peony in clear glass bud vase, camera-left', 'folded linen napkin in cream, slightly behind product', 'brass key ring with two keys, partially visible at frame edge'
scene.negative_space: string — where to leave room for text overlay. e.g. 'upper third of frame is clean background, suitable for headline overlay'

camera.camera_model: string — e.g. 'Phase One IQ4 150MP' for maximum detail
camera.aperture: string — e.g. 'f/4' for product (sharper) or 'f/2.8' for lifestyle blur
camera.shot_type: string — e.g. 'close_up product hero' or '45-degree overhead flat lay'
camera.angle: string — e.g. 'product at bottom-right third, 45-degree overhead, looking into the scene'
camera.depth_of_field: string — e.g. 'product tack-sharp front to back, background props at f/4 softness'

lighting.key_light: string — e.g. 'large softbox camera-right, mimicking window light, soft wrap with gradual falloff across product surface'
lighting.fill_light: string — e.g. 'white bounce card camera-left, opening shadows just enough to see surface detail'
lighting.highlights: string — e.g. 'single specular highlight on metallic surface, controlled, not blown. Small catch light on glass prop.'
lighting.color_temperature: string — e.g. 'warm daylight, 5600K, consistent across scene'

palette: 5 hex codes: background, surface, product, accent prop, text-overlay-safe area
color_and_style.grade: string — e.g. 'warm and airy, lifted shadows, slight warmth in highlights, skin-tone-accurate if hands visible'
color_and_style.overall_style: string — e.g. 'Aesop product campaign meets Kinfolk editorial flat lay'

negative_prompt: no floating products on void backgrounds
no pure white seamless studio look
no visible studio equipment or light stands
no plastic-looking surfaces on natural materials

minimal_marble.description: Clean marble surface, minimal props, premium feel.

scene.surface: honed white Carrara marble countertop with subtle grey veining
scene.setting: bright neutral studio environment implying high-end kitchen
scene.negative_space: upper 40% of frame is clean, suitable for text

lighting.key_light: large overhead softbox slightly camera-right, even diffused light
lighting.fill_light: white surface bounce from marble itself

color_and_style.grade: bright, clean, neutral whites, no color cast
color_and_style.overall_style: Apple product page meets Aesop minimalism

moody_dark.description: Dark, dramatic product shot. Luxury/premium feel.

scene.surface: dark walnut wood surface with visible grain, oiled finish
scene.setting: dramatic studio with black background falling off to shadow
scene.negative_space: left third of frame fades to black, suitable for light text

camera.depth_of_field: shallow, rear of product slightly soft

lighting.key_light: single hard light from camera-right, dramatic falloff, Rembrandt-style

color_and_style.grade: deep shadows, warm highlights, lifted midtones slightly, rich and moody
color_and_style.overall_style: Tom Ford campaign meets luxury watch advertisement

lifestyle_kitchen.description: Product in use in a real kitchen. Warm and lived-in.

scene.surface: light butcher block countertop with subtle knife marks
scene.setting: modern farmhouse kitchen, morning light through window, herbs growing on windowsill
props: ceramic pour-over coffee maker with dark coffee, camera-left
small stack of plates, off-white, behind product
fresh sourdough bread on cutting board, partially out of frame

camera.depth_of_field: moderate, product sharp, kitchen details pleasantly soft

lighting.key_light: morning sun through kitchen window, camera-left, casting warm patches
lighting.fill_light: ambient kitchen bounce, warm and soft

color_and_style.grade: warm and inviting, Portra-like warmth, gentle highlights
color_and_style.overall_style: Kinfolk magazine kitchen spread meets Food52 editorial
